row_notes.0: strips whitespace and comments without parsing, so it applies none of the color, number, and shorthand rewrites turbohtml does; on these stylesheets that leaves its output within 1.01-1.03x of turbohtml's, and 0.998x on bulma, so the structural shortenings change little on already-tight framework CSS
